raw_consumer_statement:
Once again, their response to my claim says transaction done with the chip but I didnt have the card on me, it was not me!!! 
How is that proof that I made the transaction if I am telling you I didnt have it. 
If you truly think I did it, give a good reason. If I had said from the beginning my card had been lost ( like it was, I simply messed up and thought I had it ) if I had said the card was lost, you wouldnt have had a reason to reject my claim. So why now? 
Give me a phone number, or an address, or any merchant info to go to them and show you I didnt do it. 
If you dont have that info is because the merchant is bogus, is fraudulent and you are hiding behind an unreasonable excuse to not refund me and respect my XXXX liability right. 
The phone number you give on your emails is fake! I stayed twice already for over XXXX hours and no one responds, I have responded to your emails and no one responds. 
If at this point you can not refund me, why? XXXX .. let me know so I can move on to getting a lawyer to sue you or contact my state attorney general for legal advice. 
I have already filed a police report and my detective pretty much said you are hiding and going against my consumer protection rights. He also said the merchant is bogus and thats why you guys have no info on them.
